# Promote The Bridge community events

## Purpose

Market **The Bridge** sub-brand events (community hub — bowling, café, kids, gatherings) as **life together**, not Sunday-only church ads.

## When to use

- Faith Chapel profile · sub_brand `the-bridge`
- Event is community/social, not sermon series

## Decision rules

- Visuals: campus life, families, activity — not pulpit stock photos
- Copy: invitation to community, not insider church language
- CTA: register / visit The Bridge / bring a friend

## Templates

- `church.social.template_event_promo`
- Optional: `church.print.design_event_poster`

## QA checks

- [ ] Sub-brand clearly The Bridge where appropriate
- [ ] Main church logo per brand guide
